sentences.arabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ المُوسِيقى العَرَبِيَّةُ بِأَصَالَتِهَا وَقُدْرَتِهَا الفَرِيدَةِ عَلَى إِثَارَةِ المَشَاعِرِ العَمِيقَةِ فِي نُفُوسِ السَّامِعِينَ.
sentences.translation: Arapska muzika se odlikuje svojom autentičnošću i jedinstvenom sposobnošću da pobudi duboka osjećanja u dušama slušalaca.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic music is characterized by its authenticity and unique ability to evoke deep emotions in listeners' souls.

sentences.arabic: وَيُعَدُّ العُودُ "سُلْطَانَ الآلَاتِ"، إِذْ يَلْعَبُ دَوْرًا مِحْوَرِيًّا فِي التَّخْتِ الشَّرْقِيِّ بِأَلْحَانِهِ الشَّجِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Oud se smatra "sultanom instrumenata", jer svojim sjetnim melodijama igra ključnu ulogu u istočnjačkom ansamblu.
sentences.translationEn: The Oud is considered the 'Sultan of Instruments,' playing a pivotal role in the Oriental ensemble with its poignant melodies.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَمِدُ العَزْفُ عَلَى هَذِهِ الآلَةِ عَلَى نِظَامِ المَقَامَاتِ الَّذِي يَمْنَحُ المُوسِيقى تَنَوُّعًا نَغَمِيًّا لَا مَثِيلَ لَهُ.
sentences.translation: Sviranje na ovom instrumentu oslanja se na sistem makama (melodijskih načina) koji muzici daje neviđenu tonalnu raznolikost.
sentences.translationEn: Playing this instrument relies on the Maqam system, which grants the music an unparalleled tonal diversity.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَنْحَصِرُ جَمَالُ العُودِ فِي صَوْتِهِ فَقَطْ، بَلْ فِي قُدْرَتِهِ عَلَى تَجْسِيدِ مَفْهُومِ "الطَّرَبِ" الَّذِي يَنْقُلُ المُسْتَمِعَ إِلَى حَالَةٍ مِنَ النَّشْوَةِ الرُّوحِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljepota ouda nije ograničena samo na njegov zvuk, već i na njegovu sposobnost da otjelovi koncept "taraba", koji slušaoca prenosi u stanje duhovnog zanosa.
sentences.translationEn: The beauty of the Oud is not limited to its sound, but in its ability to embody the concept of 'Tarab,' which transports the listener to a state of spiritual ecstasy.

sentences.arabic: عَبْرَ العُصُورِ، ظَلَّ العُودُ رَفِيقًا لِلشُّعَرَاءِ وَالمُطْرِبِينَ، مُعَبِّرًا عَنْ أَفْرَاحِ الشُّعُوبِ وَأَحْزَانِهَا.
sentences.translation: Kroz vijekove, oud je ostao pratilac pjesnika i pjevača, izražavajući radosti i tuge naroda.
sentences.translationEn: Throughout the ages, the Oud has remained a companion to poets and singers, expressing the joys and sorrows of peoples.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَعَلُّمَ العَزْفِ عَلَيْهِ يَتَطَلَّبُ صَبْرًا طَوِيلًا وَإِحْسَاسًا مُرْهَفًا بِالتَّفَاصِيلِ الدَّقِيقَةِ لِلنَّغَمِ.
sentences.translation: Učenje sviranja na njemu zahtijeva dugo strpljenje i istančan osjećaj za fine detalje tona.
sentences.translationEn: Learning to play it requires long patience and a delicate sense for the fine details of the melody.
